title: NGE on the Xbox
wikitext:
[]: NGE on the Xbox             Quote Post by Evayo » Thu May 07, 2009 6:00 pm Please move if this is in the wrong spot. For those of you who haven't heard already, Neon Genesis Evangelion is now available for download through the Xbox Live Marketplace. [url]http://marketplace.xbox.com/en-US/videos/offers/8f8f7964-13d9-4eb8-a540-7ae93ae89955?partner=RSS[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu May 07, 2009 6:08 pm Well damn that is pretty cool I mean I've got the set but for those who have not seen it yet...Maybe more people will get my CoD Clan tag now if they watch it. Someone on XBL must know what NERV is!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu May 07, 2009 6:16 pm And also: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2009-05-07/adv-posts-eva-tv-and-appleseed-film-on-xbox-kiba-on-itunes

[]:             Quote Post by Evayo » Thu May 07, 2009 6:34 pm Oh, I didn't see that. Guess I'll have to go pick me up some Appleseed too!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu May 07, 2009 9:55 pm I'm guessing it's just the dub. Am I right?

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Thu May 07, 2009 9:55 pm Yes.

[]:             Quote Post by Avatar of Dreams » Thu May 07, 2009 10:22 pm At 2 dollars an episode you're better off just buying the platinum thin pack. Then at least you get the Japanese audio and the director's cuts. Plus you never know when your xbox dies randomly to the RROD like mine did recently and you have to send it to Microsoft and then wait forever for them to fix it and send it back. Sad face.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Fri May 08, 2009 10:35 am Let me guess...US only? The only anime on the UK marketplace is the ghost in the shell movies and 'Blood: The last Vampire'

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri May 08, 2009 10:46 am Sounds cool. I hope they can give us some gamerpics soon once 1.0 comes out.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri May 08, 2009 4:22 pm Avatar of Dreams wrote: At 2 dollars an episode you're better off just buying the platinum thin pack. Then at least you get the Japanese audio and the director's cuts.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri May 08, 2009 5:16 pm Downloading movies and shows take too much memory anyways. I download the whole Guyver set and it wasted way too much memory.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue May 12, 2009 9:52 pm That's amazing, I'm GLaD Evangelion is being released. Maybe open up a few more people to it.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Wed May 13, 2009 12:57 am Half of the description was rather... misleading : Then Shinji Ikari finds himself faced with competition. Not only is Rei’s Eva back on the line, there’s also a new giant robot defender that’s being promoted by a group outside NERV! And to top it off, prepare to meet the third Eva pilot, who has got Shinji in her cross-hairs.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Wed May 13, 2009 1:03 am That's because it's exciting! Also more people might find the connection to my gamertag too.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Wed May 13, 2009 11:18 pm Alaska Slim wrote: Half of the description was rather... misleading : ... prepare to meet the third Eva pilot, who has got Shinji in her cross-hairs.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Wed May 13, 2009 11:33 pm ADV is getting really aggressive about distributing their shows through any means possible. It looks like a few of their other properties are on YouTube now.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu May 14, 2009 12:37 pm The description AlaskaSlim quoted can be found on the back of the Platinum Volume 2 release (that single volume release that comes with one of the booklets from Renewal) just fyi.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue May 19, 2009 2:24 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: The description AlaskaSlim quoted can be found on the back of the Platinum Volume 2 release (that single volume release that comes with one of the booklets from Renewal) just fyi.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Thu May 21, 2009 12:43 pm I was watching minute previews of it yesterday before I went on my way to kill zombies in Left 4 Dead.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu May 21, 2009 11:49 pm were they action-y and dramatic-y????

For those of you who haven't heard already, Neon Genesis Evangelion is now available for download through the Xbox Live Marketplace. [url]http://marketplace.xbox.com/en-US/videos/offers/8f8f7964-13d9-4eb8-a540-7ae93ae89955?partner=RSS[/url]
